app.name: Ultra Recorder Pro
app.welcome_message:
Welcome to Ultra Recorder Pro, an intelligent audio recorder developed by blind people for blind people.

This application allows you to record system audio, microphone audio, or both simultaneously. It is fully accessible with NVDA and JAWS screen readers.

Features:
• System audio recording via Stereo Mix / WASAPI loopback
• Microphone recording
• Mix both sources or record individually
• Automatic screen reader voice exclusion
• Export to WAV, MP3, Opus, FLAC, OGG
• Multi-language support (English, Portuguese, Spanish)
• Full keyboard navigation

Developer: Stefan, Stefan Games Productions

language.title: Language
language.restart_prompt: The program needs to restart to apply the language change.

errors.no_mic: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone.
errors.no_loopback: System audio recording failed. The device may be in exclusive mode.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg is required for MP3, Opus, FLAC and OGG formats. Use WAV format or place ffmpeg.exe in the program folder.
errors.permission: Run as administrator for system audio recording.
